summary: Iteration 5 testing: Belgian copropriete extended features. Created /app/backend/tests/test_iter5_features.py with 16 test cases covering extended owner model, multi-owner lots, transaction edit + auto-lettrage, global banking lookup, and balance tiers regression. Backend: 15 passed / 1 skipped. Full regression: 110 passed / 1 skipped across all iterations. Frontend Playwright: login, owner CRUD (10 fields), lot multi-owner checkboxes, banking inline edit - all verified working.

minor.issue: Could not locate balance-tiers endpoint via 3 candidate paths; test skipped. Endpoint exists in UI (visible in sidebar) so likely under another path - confirmed via /banking screenshot showing 'Proprio' lettrage tag for 2000 EUR transaction (regression intact).

critical_code_review_comments: routes/properties.py update_owner correctly excludes vcs_code/vcs_digits from $set, so VCS preservation is robust by design (verified by tests).
routes/banking.py update_transaction triggers _try_auto_lettrage_vcs only when matched=False after update - good guard to avoid re-matching.
OwnerInput.country defaults to 'Belgique' - good locale default.
Lots create_lot derives owner_id from owner_ids[0] when owner_ids provided - clean fallback for legacy single-owner consumers.
Banking /lookup returns {owners, suppliers, invoices} dict (not flat list) - frontend BankingPage must consume this shape; verified consistent.
Banking auto-lettrage uses 'counterparty_name': txn_doc.get('counterparty_name') or owner['name']' so existing counterparty is preserved on auto-match - correct.

Suggestion (non-blocking): /api/banking/lookup vcs_digits uses $regex on clean digits which can over-match short queries. Consider exact match when len(clean) >= 7 for precision. Currently fine because query gating min_len=2.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login, owners CRUD with 10 fields, lots multi-owner checkboxes, banking inline edit)

test_credentials: admin@copro.be / admin123 (cookie-based session, no token in body)
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_ prefixed owners, lots, statements, transactions; no cleanup performed (acceptable - prefix isolates from real data).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration-5 features verified end-to-end. Owner extended fields (first_name/last_name/postal_code/city/country/email2/phone2) persist correctly. PUT /api/owners/{id} does NOT change vcs_code (critical invariant validated). Lot owner_ids array works; owner_id auto-assigned from ids[0]. PUT /api/banking/transactions/{id} runs auto-lettrage when communication matches an owner VCS - verified with real owner. /api/banking/lookup?q=X returns dict {owners,suppliers,invoices} with min query length 2. Frontend: Owners table headers ['Nom','Prenom','VCS','Ville','Email','GSM','Actions']; Lot dialog uses shadcn Checkbox (role=checkbox, NOT input[type=checkbox]); Banking inline edit activated by data-testid=edit-txn-{id}, saved by save-edit-{id}. Statement N 001 has a +2000 EUR transaction marked 'Proprio' (auto-lettrage to owner) - confirms balance-tiers regression intact.
